summary: Completed comprehensive mobile Sales app testing (FASE 4 stage/sub-status verification). All core mobile features working correctly. Stage pills and sub-status chips render properly on both mobile and desktop - NO raw status strings found. Desktop regression check passed.

data_issues.issue: No customers available in database for sales user's entity
data_issues.impact: Cannot complete order placement in mobile cart (shows 'Pilih customer dulu' error)
data_issues.note: This is a DATA issue, not a UI bug. The UI correctly validates and shows error when no customer is selected. In production, customers would exist.

passed_tests: Mobile viewport detection (390x844) - renders mobile-first view for sales role
All 5 mobile tabs functional (Beranda/Katalog/Keranjang/Pesanan/Lainnya)
BERANDA: KPI cards render with real values (Komisi MTD, Penjualan MTD, AR Outstanding, Overdue)
BERANDA: 'Buat Pesanan Baru' button switches to catalog
BERANDA: Recent orders show STAGE PILLS (Reserved, Shipped) - NOT raw status strings
KATALOG: Products render with images and prices
KATALOG: Search and category filters work
KATALOG: Add to cart works, cart badge increments correctly
KERANJANG: Cart items display correctly, quantity controls work
KERANJANG: Subtotal calculates correctly, checkout flow accessible
PESANAN: 19 order cards with 7 stage pills and 5 sub-status chips
PESANAN: Stage pills show proper labels (Reserved/Approved/Confirmed/Shipped/Delivered) - NO raw status
PESANAN: Sub-status chips show proper labels (Siap disahkan, Stok siap, Siap pick, Sebagian dikirim)
PESANAN: Filters (all/active/done/cancelled) and search work
PESANAN: Expand order detail works
LAINNYA: Profile/menu renders, Force Desktop option works
DESKTOP REGRESSION: Admin view renders correctly (NOT mobile)
DESKTOP REGRESSION: Order list shows stage pills with proper labels
DESKTOP REGRESSION: OrderDetailPanel stage timeline works (6 steps + sub-status chips)
UI QUALITY: No console errors, no red overlay, no horizontal overflow
